allies.rationale_text: Simplification helps complexity-bias-resistance strip away decorative detail as long as the causal core stays intact.
allies.source_quote: The disciplined commitment to simplicity and clarity.

allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking helps complexity-bias-resistance test whether a reduction preserves the real logic of the case instead of just sounding neat.
allies.source_quote: Ensuring decisions and communications are grounded in essential clarity.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Complexity-bias-resistance conflicts with systems-thinking when insistence on simple explanations cuts off feedback loops and second-order effects that only emerge through system-level analysis.
structured_tensions.source_quote: complexity-bias-resistance conflicts with systems-thinking (systems thinking) when insistence on simple explanations cuts off feedback loops and second-order effects that only emerge through system-level analysis.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Complexity-bias-resistance conflicts with combinatorial-effects when resistance to complexity dismisses genuine multi-factor interactions as unnecessary elaboration.
structured_tensions.source_quote: complexity-bias-resistance conflicts with combinatorial-effects (combinatorial effects) when resistance to complexity dismisses genuine multi-factor interactions as unnecessary elaboration.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the relation surface narrow around disciplined simplification and critical scrutiny of what belongs in the core.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader teaching and communication sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary seams.
open_questions: False-precision and prioritization are source-real nearby, but the current first-order surface is cleanest around simplification and critical-thinking.
